mapDesc._value: The town for beginners. Playing the game through simple quests\r\nYou'll learn how to move around here.
An harbor down south. It's the place where you can travel to a much bigger island.

mapDesc._value: It's an island located at the east of Maple Island, and it has various stores like weapon store, armor store, and department stores.
The port city in Victoria Island. Enables one to travel to different cities.
It's a bowman town on a wide prairie, and you can choose to become a bowman here.
It's a magician town surrounded by the forest, and you can choose to become a magician here.

help0._value:
#e[MapleStory Physical Fitness Test]#n

Hi there, thank you for participating in our event game. Here's a little introduction about the game.

[MapleStory Physical Fitness Test] is a race through an obstacle course#k much like the Forest of Patience. You can win by overcoming various obstacles and reaching the final destination within the time limit.
The game consists of #rfour levels#k, and the time limit is #b15 MINUTES#k. During the [MapleStory Physical Fitness Test], you will not be able to use #bteleport or haste#k.

If you have any other questions regarding the game, feel free to ask during the game.

mapName._value: MapleStory Physical Fitness Test <Easy Waiting Room>
